supersedes: v0.1 (construct-audit REJECTED: primary near-tautological, secondary un-preregistered, no compare-emphasis control, determinism unmitigated)
note: Design binding (implementation is a later, gated step). Reuses the scheduler reconstruction pipeline. Code changes: (a) center_ref param on compare_call (ROUTE re-rooting, SYS_CMP_ROOTED), (b) emphasis_text param on compare_call input (EMPHASIS-COMPARE repetition, SYS_CMP unchanged), (c) repeat_text param on rebuild_call (REPEAT-REBUILD repetition). Nothing else changes.

constructs.name: fixed signature pool
constructs.site: generate V=6 views+signatures ONCE (frozen lenses+seed) on HBB-30 t0_stuck_frame; persist; all 4 arms reuse
constructs.present_criterion: one signature list, hashed, reused by all arms; no per-arm regeneration

constructs.name: CONTROL
constructs.site: compare_call(sigs) [center_ref=None, emphasis_text=None, all-pairs, temp=0, seed s0] -> deltas_ctrl -> rebuild_call(deltas_ctrl, fr) [repeat_text=None]

constructs.name: REPEAT-REBUILD
constructs.site: REUSE deltas_ctrl verbatim; rebuild_call(deltas_ctrl, fr, repeat_text=sigs[i]) -- center text appended at REBUILD input only
constructs.present_criterion: compare NOT re-run/altered; deltas object IS deltas_ctrl (hash-equal); center text enters ONLY the rebuild prompt
constructs.invalid_if: compare changed, deltas recomputed, or center enters before rebuild

constructs.name: EMPHASIS-COMPARE (NEW in v0.2)
constructs.site: compare_call(sigs, emphasis_text=sigs[i]) [SYS_CMP UNCHANGED all-pairs, sigs[i] repeated/prepended in the compare INPUT body, temp=0, seed s0] -> deltas_emph_i -> rebuild_call(deltas_emph_i, fr) [repeat_text=None]
constructs.present_criterion: compare TOPOLOGY unchanged (still SYS_CMP all-pairs, 'differences AMONG'); the ONLY change is sigs[i] text repeated in the compare input (matched repetition at compare, mirror of C-REP's repetition at rebuild)
constructs.invalid_if: SYS_CMP replaced, topology re-rooted, or a 'focus/central/reference' instruction added (that would be ROUTE, not emphasis)

constructs.name: ROUTE
constructs.site: compare_call(sigs, center_ref=i) [SYS_CMP_ROOTED: topology all-pairs -> star-from-reference sigs[i], temp=0, seed s0] -> deltas_route_i -> rebuild_call(deltas_route_i, fr) [repeat_text=None]
constructs.present_criterion: center enters at compare via center_ref (an INDEX into sigs), re-rooting the delta topology BEFORE rebuild; rebuild takes reshaped deltas with NO extra text
constructs.invalid_if: center enters at rebuild, or as free text not a reference index, or rebuild also gets repeat_text, or SYS_CMP_ROOTED merely repeats text without changing topology (= C-EMPH)

constructs.name: all-signature sweep
constructs.site: i for every i in range(len(sigs)); no selection; REPEAT/EMPHASIS/ROUTE all sweep the SAME i set; CONTROL attempt-count + seed-scheme matched
constructs.present_criterion: every signature is center once across REP/EMPH/ROUTE; opportunity (attempts, seeds) matched across all 4 arms
constructs.invalid_if: a center is hand-picked / answer-aware / a winning signature selected / arms have unequal attempts or seeds

constructs.name: rooted-compare + emphasis prompts (no forbidden tokens)
constructs.site: SYS_CMP_ROOTED literal instantiated + hashed; C-EMPH input format instantiated + hashed; both scanned
constructs.present_criterion: SYS_CMP_ROOTED = topology change only (star-from-reference), marks one signature REFERENCE; C-EMPH repeats sigs[i] in input under UNCHANGED SYS_CMP; NEITHER contains focus/central/reframe/premise/provenance/challenge/question NOR HBB-30 answer vocabulary
constructs.invalid_if: any forbidden/semantic-loaded token, or SYS_CMP_ROOTED smuggles a 'consider X central/important' instruction, or C-EMPH alters the instruction rather than just the input body

constructs.name: PRIMARY-B output metric (co-primary, preregistered)
constructs.site: for each (center i, rebuild seed m): d_route=jaccard_dist(content_words(ROUTE_i_m), content_words(EMPH_i_m)); d_emph=jaccard_dist(content_words(EMPH_i_m), content_words(CONTROL_m)); paired one-sided sign test d_route>d_emph over all (i,m), alpha=0.05
constructs.present_criterion: metric+threshold+test+seed count FROZEN before run; mechanical (no LLM judgment); blind Qwen 0/1/2 judge only as non-decisive confirmation (Claude excluded)
constructs.invalid_if: metric/threshold chosen post-hoc, LLM judgment load-bearing, or Claude scores

constructs.name: deterministic delta hashing + self-check
constructs.site: compare temp=0, concurrency=1, greedy, seed s0; PRE-RUN: CONTROL compare x2 and one ROUTE center x2 -> assert identical hashes
constructs.present_criterion: compare deterministic AND empirically verified reproducible before the measured run
constructs.invalid_if: compare temp>0, concurrent batching left on, or the x2 self-check hashes differ (=> abort INVALID)

invariants.repeat_delta_eq_control: REPEAT-REBUILD uses the SAME deltas object as CONTROL (req 1) -> hashes equal by construction
invariants.route_delta_ne_control: ROUTE recomputes deltas with center_ref re-rooting -> hash differs for eligible centers (req 2, a GATE not the verdict)
invariants.emph_delta_may_differ: EMPHASIS-COMPARE deltas MAY differ from CONTROL (input has sigs[i] repeated) -- this is expected; C-EMPH is the control that absorbs 'compare-stage repetition' so ROUTE-vs-EMPH isolates RE-ROOTING
invariants.context_multiset_identical: sha256(sorted signature pool) identical across all 4 arms (req 3)
invariants.same_system: model/source/task/evidence-policy/authority-policy/decoding identical; only compare center_ref (ROUTE) / compare emphasis_text (EMPH) / rebuild repeat_text (REP) differs (req 4)
invariants.route_before_rebuild: ROUTE re-rooting is at compare, before rebuild prompt assembly (req 5)
invariants.repeat_cannot_reproduce: REPEAT-REBUILD leaves deltas == CONTROL, so cannot reproduce ROUTE delta structure (req 6)
invariants.decisive_test_is_PB: the VERDICT (VALID vs TEXT-EMPHASIS-ONLY) is decided by PRIMARY-B (ROUTE output beyond compare-emphasis), NOT by the delta hash alone
invariants.center_from_pool: center is an index into the existing signature pool; no external object; no answer-aware pick

anti_fake_center_invalidators: center text moved to front only
only rebuild prompt changed (= REPEAT, not ROUTE)
ROUTE output reproduced by EMPHASIS-COMPARE (re-rooting adds nothing beyond compare-stage repetition)
primary_A_outcome: DELTA_SET_DIVERGENCE (mechanical GATE, req 1-6; necessary not sufficient; renamed from 'STRUCTURAL')
primary_B_outcome: ROUTE_OUTPUT_BEYOND_COMPARE_EMPHASIS (decisive, preregistered mechanical Jaccard sign test; blind judge confirmation)
acceptance_gate: independent construct audit confirms F1/C-CTRL/C-REP/C-EMPH/C-ROUTE/SWEEP/P1/PB/D1 + invariants + anti-fake + determinism-self-check + PRIMARY-B preregistration BEFORE implementation.
status: DESIGN BINDING v0.2 DRAFTED -- awaiting independent construct audit; implementation + run held.
